title: Block Ring
description: This Mod Adds A New Item The Block Ring Allowing You To Get Passive Buffs And Ability's
body:
**Block Ring:** Block Ring Is A New Item That Gives Passive Buffs And Adds Usable Ability's.

![Blank Ring](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9eeaa1a13c14988656fcb1906ec031888139fce0.png)
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**List Of Ability's:** Each Ability Is Tied To A Specific Block That Must Be Imputed Into The Ring.

<details>
<summary>List Of Ability's</summary>
  
Block: Nothing, Ability: None
  
Block: Bedrock, Ability: Void

Block: Netherite, Ability: Fire Resistance

Block: Command Block, Ability: /Give

Block: Lapis, Ability: Experience Gain

Block: Sculk, Ability: Shriek

Block: Magma Block, Ability: Fiery Explosion

Block: Cactus, Ability: Spiked

Block: Obsidian, Ability: Reinforced

Block: Snow Block, Ability: Snowball

Block: Green Stained Glass, Ability: X-Ray

Block: Sponge Block, Ability: Water Breathing

Block: Emerald Block, Ability: Hero Of The Village


</details>

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Effects:** Spiked: Every Mob That Attacks You Takes Damage While Effect Is Active. 

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Items:** Block Ring, Iron Ring ![Iron Ring](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7eeace55f1f67aa81c21671f7852f83038af5b5_0.webp), Ring Upgrade Template![Ring Upgrade Template](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d7577477bf30fa53110a7eb271a2cf1a77252f5.png).

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**To Use Ability's Crouch And Drop The Ring With A Usable Block Inputed.**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
_Note: I Have Paused The Development Of This Project To Work On Others._
